getBookingStatusHistory: SELECT * FROM booking_status_history ORDER BY changed_at DESC
getBookingStatusHistoryByBookingId: SELECT * FROM booking_status_history WHERE booking_id = $1 ORDER BY changed_at DESC
addBookingStatusHistory: INSERT INTO booking_status_history (booking_id, old_status, new_status, changed_by, status_old_id, status_new_id) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6) RETURNING *
deleteBookingStatusHistory: DELETE FROM booking_status_history WHERE bsh_id = $1 RETURNING *
